prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次约5337→5058→4712→32528→30812，2024年起因新增护理学专业（位次约3.2万）大幅拉低校线，剔除护理学后主校区专业位次约4700–5100名区间，整体呈稳中略升趋势；2025年基准位次约30812名；该校在河南理科组招生计划2021年239人、2022年236人、2023年244人、2024年242人、2025年242人；2026年计划大幅扩招至302人，较2025年增加60人（+24.8%），扩招幅度显著，理论上降低录取竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第33名（近年稳定在28–33名区间），属于国内顶尖理工类高校；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面（涉及学生困难认定事件及教师师德处理），但抖音综合热度排名第33位（较热），短视频曝光量较大，报考关注度仍较高；历史投档异常记录显示2022年曾出现断档关注信号；电子科学与技术A+、信息与通信工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、仪器科学与技术A-、光学工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，电子信息类学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业社会热度高热推荐，计算机类推荐，电气工程高热推荐，均为当前报考热门方向；河南2025年物理类考生约55.5万人，2026年全省普通高考总人数约120万，预计物理类考生规模继续增长，竞争基数扩大；电子科技大学位于四川成都（西南地区），非本省高校；该校在河南招生占比约6.6%（2025年），属中等偏上外省招生规模，无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招（+24.8%）的竞争缓解效应与电子信息类专业持续高热、河南考生规模增长等竞争加剧因素，两者对冲后扩招影响略占主导，但学校顶尖工科地位和热门专业吸引力使位次不会大幅后移；，考虑专业热度与考生规模增长适度回调，预测最低位次约34895名，区间34395–35395名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 5337 → 5058 → 4712 → 32528 → 30812. Starting in 2024, due to the addition of the nursing major (ranking around 32,000), the school's admission line was significantly lowered. Excluding the nursing major, the main campus major rankings range from about 4700 to 5100, showing a stable to slightly rising trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 30812. The enrollment plan for the science group in Henan was 239 in 2021, 236 in 2022, 244 in 2023, 242 in 2024, and 242 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 302, an increase of 60 (24.8%) compared to 2025, which theoretically reduces admission competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 33rd (stable in the 28–33 range in recent years), belonging to the top-tier science and engineering universities in China. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving student hardship identification incidents and teacher ethics handling), but its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranks 33rd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure and still considerable application attention. Historical admission anomalies show a signal of a cutoff concern in 2022. Electronic Science and Technology is A+, Information and Communication Engineering is A+, Computer Science and Technology is A, Instrument Science and Technology is A-, Optical Engineering is A-, and Management Science and Engineering is A-. The strength of electronic information disciplines is top in the country, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic information/communication majors are highly recommended, computer majors are recommended, and electrical engineering is highly recommended, all being popular directions for current applications. In 2025, there were approximately 555,000 physics category candidates in Henan, and in 2026, the total number of general college entrance examination candidates in the province is about 1.2 million, with the physics category candidate scale expected to continue growing, expanding the competition base. The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan (southwest region), not a local university. Its enrollment proportion in Henan is about 6.6% (2025), which is a medium to high scale for out-of-province enrollment, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the competition relief effect of the significant expansion in 2026 (+24.8%) and the continued high popularity of electronic information majors, as well as the growth in the number of Henan candidates, the two factors offset each other, with the expansion impact slightly dominant. However, the school's top engineering status and popular major attractiveness prevent a significant backward shift in ranking. Considering the major popularity and candidate scale growth, a moderate adjustment is made, predicting a minimum ranking of approximately 34895, with a range of 34395–35395.

It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 34000 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Class, Electronic Information Class, Electronic Engineering Class); candidates with rankings in the 34500–35500 range should mainly target Tier 2 majors (Software Engineering, Optoelectronics, Robotics, Mathematics Class, etc.), while also considering borderline Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings above 35500 are advised to target Tier 3 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans

The university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Henan was 10 students in 2021, 10 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 8 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 8 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 33rd, belonging to top-tier science and engineering universities. Although liberal arts majors are not its main focus, they still have strong appeal due to the overall brand effect. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation is slightly negative, but it is popular on Douyin. The university is known for science and engineering, with a very small liberal arts enrollment (only 3 majors). Reputation fluctuations have limited impact on liberal arts applications. The university's liberal arts-related disciplines are not rated in Class A, but the Social Science Experimental Class includes law (the university's law program is not separately rated), and the Foreign Languages and Literature category corresponds to a first-level discipline that is not separately rated. Overall, liberal arts majors are not the university's strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of foreign language majors is generally lukewarm, law is polarized, and overall liberal arts major popularity is stable. In 2025, Henan had approximately 352,000 history category examinees. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance examination takers in the province is about 1.2 million, and the history category examinee scale is expected to remain basically stable. The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university in Henan. Only 8 students are enrolled in liberal arts in Henan, a very small proportion, so regional factors have no significant impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: The enrollment plan is unchanged with no expansion or reduction impact. Considering that the university's liberal arts are not its strength, the enrollment scale is very small, and rankings have fluctuated significantly in recent years, combined with the stable scale of history category examinees in Henan, the baseline ranking is slightly adjusted upward to reflect the clear recovery trend in 2025 compared to 2024. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1893, with a range of 1393–2393.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China only recruits the Nursing major in Henan Province under the Medicine category. From 2021 to 2024, no separate Medicine admission data is available. In 2025, the minimum ranking for Medicine appeared for the first time at 30,812, with a total plan of 5 students. In 2026, the Medicine enrollment plan is reduced to 4 students (a 20% reduction), and the plan change significantly impacts the ranking. Since historical data covers only one year, a complete trend line cannot be formed, but the reduction signal is clear. According to the supply-demand elasticity model calculation, the ranking should decrease compared to 2025 (the ranking number decreases, reducing competition pressure).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities. It focuses on electronic information science and technology, with strong strengths in science and engineering. The university is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province. Although it is not a traditional medical powerhouse, its Nursing major, relying on the university's engineering background and the Shahe Campus, has gradually developed characteristics in recent years.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of Medicine majors has remained high. Nursing, as an important major under the Medicine category, has stable social demand. The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China only offers the Nursing major in Henan Province under Medicine, with a very small enrollment scale (4-5 students), making it a scarce enrollment plan that is prone to significant ranking fluctuations due to individual candidate score variations. In 2026, this major is upgraded to an AI Cross-Innovation Talent Training Experimental Class, increasing the major's attractiveness and competitiveness.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and the major upgrade factor, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in Henan Province under Medicine in 2026 will be around 27,200, a decrease of approximately 3,612 places compared to 2025 (the ranking number decreases), with a fluctuation range of 26,700 to 27,700. It is recommended that candidates plan their volunteer choices reasonably within this range.
